{{Infobox character
| name = Colossal Moon-eater
| aliases = Moon-eater
| species = Sacred beast
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]]
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Colossal Moon-eater]] is a flying sacred beast with blood [[aura]] that has an aspect of preservation.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Colossal Moon-eater]] carries a small town strapped to its back.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Moon-eater possesses authority that could affect transportation out of a location.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Sacred beasts]]
